entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A resilient crop that is relatively drought tolerant compared to many other legumes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand water-limited conditions

entities.name: HIDDEN MARKOV MODELS
entities.description: A statistical method used to select 51 genes to understand molecular mechanisms of drought tolerance in pigeonpea

entities.name: ICPL 151
entities.description: A parent of mapping populations segregating for drought tolerance

entities.name: ICPL 8755
entities.description: A parent of mapping populations segregating for drought tolerance

entities.name: ICPL 227
entities.description: A parent of mapping populations segregating for drought tolerance

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Ten genes that showed ≥2-fold up-regulation in higher drought tolerant genotypes

entities.name: PLANT U-BOX PROTEIN
entities.description: A class of proteins encoded by four of the identified differentially expressed genes

entities.name: UNIVERSAL STRESS PROTEIN A-LIKE PROTEIN
entities.description: A class of proteins encoded by four of the identified differentially expressed genes

entities.name: CATION/H(+) ANTIPORTER PROTEIN
entities.description: A class of protein encoded by one of the identified differentially expressed genes

entities.name: UNCHARACTERIZED PROTEIN
entities.description: A class of protein encoded by one of the identified differentially expressed genes

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis performed on whole genome re-sequencing data of 292 lines using 10 candidate genes

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: Data source used for haplotype analysis of 292 lines

entities.name: INDUCED WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition created using polyethylene glycol (PEG) at the seedling stage to validate haplotype results

entities.name: POLYETHYLENE GLYCOL
entities.description: A chemical agent used to induce water stress in seedlings

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage at which induced water stress is applied for phenotyping

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs that use superior haplotypes of candidate genes to develop more drought tolerant lines

relationships.description: stage at which stress is applied
